title: microcitrus inodora
intro: Microcitrus inodora, also known as the lemon-scented microcitrus, is a small shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of M. inodora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
